profile.name: Vigneshwar Pasupathi
profile.tagline: I build fast, accessible, and well-crafted web applications.

paragraphs: I am a Senior Software Engineer with a strong foundation in full-stack development, particularly skilled in React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. My professional journey includes significant contributions at Guidewire Software, where I have been recognized for my technical expertise and collaborative spirit.

Beyond my technical role, I am actively involved in the Toastmasters community — serving as the Registration Chair for the Illuminate 2024 Semi Annual Conference and receiving the Contributor Award from Wake-Up Chennai Toastmasters Club.
I am passionate about continuous learning and community engagement, always seeking opportunities to grow and contribute meaningfully.

positions.title: Full Stack Engineer
positions.description: Working on a Cyber insurance domain, mentoring junior devs, and building new features with Angular, Node.js, and PostgreSQL.

positions.title: Senior Software Engineer
positions.description: Built reusable React components, developed REST APIs, and mentored junior engineers on clean code practices.

positions.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
positions.description: Full stack development for a UK-based finance client.

positions.title: Full Stack Developer
positions.description: Built and shipped a food delivery platform for a US-based client.

positions.title: Design Engineer
positions.description: Created detailed technical drawings for a wide range of industrial products.
